prose.en: The destruction of data on hardware components is carried out in such a manner that data recovery can be reasonably considered to be impossible.

guidance.en: The deletion of data or physical destruction of data mediums can take place, for example, according to DIN 66399 or BSI IT-Grundschutz module CON.6.

This criterion is not applicable for hardware components that do not store cloud service customer data, cloud service derived data, cloud service provider data or account data (e.g. monitors, routers or keyboards).
